heading: Disposition of receipts
label: 8704 Disposition of receipts
text: Amounts received under this chapter shall be credited to appropriations for maintaining naval salvage facilities. However, any amount received under this chapter in any fiscal year in excess of naval salvage costs incurred by the Navy during that fiscal year shall be deposited into the general fund of the Treasury.
notes: Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–232section 7364 of this title
